{{Fig|Exemplary graph showing the highest priority [[Glossary:Item|item]] (with the lowest [[Glossary:Priority|priority]] %) that was missed in repetitions on a given day. In the picture, you can see the increase in the [[Glossary:Item|item]] priority protection from 0.5% to 11% within a month. This is possible by focusing on honest [[Priority queue|prioritization]], doing lots of repetitions, avoiding mass up-prioritizations, etc.}}
